testcase.name: <golden:new_validators_display_formats>
testcase.failure: Line 1: MEDICARE_MBI detected with 95.0% confidence (HIGH) Match: 1EG4-TE5-MK73 Validator: medicalid Line 6: US_STREET_ADDRESS detected with 95.0% confidence (HIGH) Match: 123 42nd Street Validator: physical_address Line 5: DATE_OF_BIRTH detected with 90.0% confidence (HIGH) Match: 03.14.1987 Validator: dob Line 4: DATE_OF_BIRTH detected with 90.0% confidence (HIGH) Match: 3/14/87 Validator: dob Line 4: DATE_OF_BIRTH detected with 90.0% confidence (HIGH) Match: March 14th, 1987 Validator: dob Line 7: US_STREET_ADDRESS detected with 90.0% confidence (HIGH) Match: 1234 US Highway 61 Validator: physical_address Line 8: US_STREET_ADDRESS detected with 85.0% confidence (MEDIUM) Match: 742 evergreen terrace Validator: physical_address Line 2: IBAN detected with 80.0% confidence (MEDIUM) Match: DE89 3704 0044 0532 0130 00 Validator: bank_account Line 3: DRIVERS_LICENSE detected with 70.0% confidence (MEDIUM) Match: D123-4567-8901 Validator: driverslicense
